title: I See My Armored Hand
description: Render your armor in first-person view for a more immersive Minecraft experience! Supports trims, colors, and enchantments.
body:
# I See My Armored Hand

**Render your armor in first-person view for a more immersive Minecraft experience! Supports trims, colors, and enchantments.**

---

## 📖 Description

**Take your Minecraft experience to the next level!**  
"I See My Armored Hand" is a lightweight and elegant mod that enhances immersion by rendering the player's armor on their hand while in **first-person view**. Whether you're exploring, fighting mobs, or simply admiring your armor, this mod ensures you can see any part of your equipped gear, including **armor trims**, **colored armor**, and **enchanted armor effects**, directly during gameplay.

---

## 🌟 Features

- **First-person armor rendering**: See your equipped armor on your hand while in first-person, making the game feel more immersive and realistic.  
- **Full compatibility**: Works flawlessly with all vanilla armors, including leather, iron, gold, diamond, netherite, and even modded armors!  
- **Armor trims and enchantments**: Fully supports the new trims and enchantment glint effects introduced in the latest Minecraft updates.  
- **Lightweight and efficient**: Designed to be simple, with no noticeable impact on game performance.  

---

## ⚙️ Compatibility

- **Minecraft Versions**:  
  - Fully compatible with **1.20**, **1.20.1**, **1.21+**.  

- **Modding Platforms**:  
  - **Fabric**: ✅ Fully supported!  
  - **NeoForge**: ✅ Fully supported!  
  - **Forge**: ✅ Fully supported!  

---

## 📦 Installation

1. **Download the mod**:  
   - For Fabric or NeoForge, grab the latest version of the mod from [CurseForge](#) or [Modrinth](#).  
2. **Install Fabric/NeoForge**: Ensure you have the appropriate modding platform installed for your Minecraft version.  
3. **Add the mod**: Place the `.jar` file into the `mods` folder of your Minecraft instance.  
4. **Launch the game**: Start Minecraft and enjoy seeing your armor in first-person view!  

---

## 💡 Why Use This Mod?

Minecraft's default first-person view doesn't show your armor, which can make your character feel disconnected from the world. "I See My Armored Hand" bridges that gap by rendering your armor directly on your hand, creating a more immersive and personalized experience. Whether you're wearing diamond armor with trims or enchanted netherite gear, this mod ensures your style is always visible.

---

## 🛠️ Contributing & Feedback

Contributions, ideas, and bug reports are always welcome!  
- Found a bug? Report it on our [GitHub](https://github.com/RazorPlay01/I-See-My-Armored-Hand/issues).  
- Have a feature request? Let us know in the comments or open a suggestion thread.  
- Want to contribute? Feel free to fork the project and submit a pull request.  

---
